_note: Changing ANY value below requires: 1) run scripts/backup-models.sh, 2) change freqai.identifier in config.live.json (e.g. ai_crypto_v2), 3) delete old model directory. See docs/valid-reasons-to-delete-any-model.md
_dry_run_note: config.json (dry-run) uses different values ([10,20] periods, shifted=1, label=12h) and produces models INCOMPATIBLE with live models. Do not mix.
